explanation: I selected the tax year for the report.
The tax year is selected, so I am moving to the income source.
I chose self-employment as the income source.
The income source is set, so I am moving to how the income changed.
I selected stopped income, which means the new amount should be zero.
The change type is selected, so I am moving to the previous amount.
I entered the previous monthly amount before the income stopped.
The previous amount is complete, so I am moving to the new amount.
I entered zero because the income stopped.
The amount change is complete, so I am moving to contact details.
I chose post as the follow-up contact method.
I entered the postal address for follow-up contact.
The contact details are complete, so I am moving to supporting notes.

action.text: Business closed at the end of the tax year.

explanation: I added a short note that explains why the income stopped.
The answers are complete, so I am moving to the review page.

action.question: The income update is ready to send. Do you want me to continue and submit it?

explanation: The review page is ready, and the next action would submit the update, so I am asking for confirmation.
